Nashville's Grief Eco-System

Everywhere you go,
your grief goes — let us walk with you.

A restorative space where grief is normalized in a grief-avoidant society through therapy services, grief-informed education, clinical support, and community care.

Register for Grief Support Schedule a Consultation
Our Foundation

What We Believe

The Grief Center supports grief, trauma, and major life transitions through therapy services, grief-informed education, clinical support, and community care.

Image placeholder

Grief is Personal

We recognize that grief and mental wellness is a deeply individual experience, and we provide tailored support to meet you where you are.

Healing is Possible

While loss forever changes us, we believe in the possibility of growth and renewal. Every step forward is a step toward healing.

Care Rooted in Trust

We offer confidential, compassionate support in a safe environment where individuals, couples, and families can be fully seen, heard, and cared for.

How We Help

Our Services

Individual therapy, grief groups, family sessions, and couples support designed to help people process loss, trauma, and major life transitions.

01

Individual Counseling Sessions

One-on-one grief and mental health counseling tailored to the individual, with support for processing loss, trauma, and life transitions while building practical coping tools.

Learn more
02

Group Grief Support

A collective space for people experiencing loss to connect with others, share openly, feel understood, and learn coping strategies in a supportive facilitated setting.

Register now
03

Family Grief Sessions

Support for families who have recently experienced a loss and need space to process together, strengthen communication, and receive guided care as a unit.

Learn more
04

Couples Therapy

Counseling designed to help partners navigate relationship challenges, improve communication, deepen understanding, and strengthen emotional intimacy during difficult seasons.

Learn more
05

Care That Meets You Where You Are

Our services are designed to support individuals, couples, and families navigating grief, trauma, and life transitions with care that is personal, grounded, and responsive.

Start the conversation
Support for loss, trauma,
and life transitions.
Meet the Founder

Christal R. Pennic

LPC-MHSP
Founder & Chief Grief Executive

Christal leads a group practice of dedicated therapists and support staff committed to normalizing grief in a society that often avoids it. With deep expertise in grief therapy, clinical supervision, and trauma-informed care, she has built The Grief Center as a restorative ecosystem for individuals, families, organizations, and communities.

From individual counseling and family sessions to grief groups and broader grief-informed support, Christal's vision is to create a safe place where people can process, heal, and grow.

"Everywhere you go, your grief goes — let us walk with you."

Accepted Insurance & Affiliates

Listen & Learn

The Grip Spot Podcast

Conversations about grief, healing, and the human experience. The Grief Center's companion podcast brings you stories, expert insights, and a compassionate space to explore what it means to grieve — and to grow.

Listen to the Podcast

Ready to take the first step?

Whether you're navigating loss, supporting a loved one, or looking for grief-informed care, we're here.
